en.title: Bibliography & References - Paceva
en.description: Scientific sources and peer-reviewed studies supporting Paceva athletic models.
en.content: Bibliography & References Paceva's analytical engine is built on validated, peer-reviewed sports science models. Here are the key publications behind our calculations. 1. W' Balance (Anaerobic Capacity Depletion) The dynamic model for tracking anaerobic work capacity remaining above Critical Power is derived from: Skiba, P. F., et al. (2012). "Modeling the expenditure and reconstitution of work capacity above critical power." Medicine & Science in Sports & Exercise , 44(8), 1526-1532. Skiba, P.

en.title: Contact Paceva
en.description: Get in touch with the Paceva support team.
en.content: Contact Have a question or feedback? We'd love to hear from you. Get in Touch For support, bug reports, feature requests, or custom integration enquiries, send us an email and we'll get back to you as soon as possible. analyticszone@onmedic.org Athletes & Coaches If you are interested in custom dashboards or want to test early beta releases for multi-sport training groups, let us know. Response Time We typically reply within 1–2 business days.

en.title: Safety & Medical Disclaimer - Paceva
en.description: Safety disclaimer for using training metrics in Paceva application.
en.content: Safety & Medical Disclaimer Please read this disclaimer carefully. Paceva is a data analysis tool, not a medical service. 1. For Informational Purposes Only All content, calculations, estimations, and metrics provided by the Paceva application and website (including W' Balance, Critical Power, Heart Rate Variability recovery status, and pacing zones) are for informational and educational purposes only. They do not constitute professional medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, or training prescrip

en.title: FAQ - Paceva
en.description: Frequently Asked Questions about W' Balance, HRV, and privacy in Paceva.
en.content: Frequently Asked Questions Common questions about Paceva multi-sport analytics, locally-computed metrics, and privacy. What makes Paceva different from other training platforms? Most platforms require uploading your training files to a remote cloud server. Paceva runs completely locally on your device. Every calculation, from W' Balance to Heart Rate Variability and gait analysis, is processed on-device. This guarantees absolute speed, offline access, and complete privacy. What is W' Balance (W

en.title: Paceva | Triathlon & Multi-Sport Analytics
en.description: Locally-computed sports analytics for swim, bike, and run. Track W' Balance, HRV, and gait metrics.
en.content: Paceva: Multi-Sport & Triathlon Analytics Optimize your training across swimming, cycling, and running with locally-computed performance metrics. Track W' Balance, Critical Swim Speed, and HRV recovery with 100% privacy. Explore Features Get in Touch Local-First Multi-Sport Intelligence Paceva is designed for triathletes and multi-sport athletes who want to analyze their training data without relying on third-party cloud servers. Every metric is computed directly on your device, ensuring maximum

en.title: Privacy Policy - Paceva
en.description: How Paceva protects your data. 100% on-device analytics with complete privacy.
en.content: Privacy Policy Your sports analytics data is yours. The app is designed to work locally, without tracking, and you decide what you share. Last updated: June 2026 Our Commitment At Paceva, your privacy is not an option; it is the foundation of everything we build. We do not sell personal data and collect only the minimum necessary to provide the service. Key Points Local-first: By default, training data lives only on your device. No tracking: We do not use third-party analytics SDKs or advertisin
